gameTypes.name: Listen & Find
gameTypes.instruction: Listen, then tap the right picture!

gameTypes.name: What is it?
gameTypes.instruction: Look and tap the right word!

gameTypes.name: Find the Sound
gameTypes.instruction: Tap each speaker. Which one is the picture?

gameTypes.name: Match It
gameTypes.instruction: Match every picture to its word!

gameTypes.name: Sort It
gameTypes.instruction: Put each word in the right box!

gameTypes.name: Build a Sentence
gameTypes.instruction: Tap the words in the right order!

gameTypes.name: Spell It
gameTypes.instruction: Tap the letters to spell the word!

gameTypes.name: Yes or No?
gameTypes.instruction: Is it right? Tap yes or no!

gameTypes.name: Listen & Read
gameTypes.instruction: Listen, then tap the right word!

gameTypes.name: Fix It
gameTypes.instruction: Tap the sentence that is right!

gameTypes.name: Sort by Rule
gameTypes.instruction: Put each one in the right box!

gap.text: A lion is ___ than a cat.
A snail is ___ than a rocket.
A giraffe is ___ than a dog.

fix.wrong: A lion is big than a cat.

fix.right: A snail is slower than a rocket.
fix.wrong: A snail is slow than a rocket.

fix.right: A giraffe is taller than a dog.
fix.wrong: A giraffe is tall than a dog.
